description: Plat and Map Recording — records subdivision plats, lot line adjustments, parcel maps, and condominium plans with surveyor certification and planning approval verification

hard_stops.label: Surveyor Certification Missing
hard_stops.logic: Plat or map does not bear the certification of a licensed land surveyor — cannot be recorded per state survey statutes

hard_stops.label: Planning Commission Approval Not Obtained
hard_stops.logic: Subdivision plat or parcel map has not received required planning commission or governing body approval

hard_stops.label: Map Does Not Meet Recording Standards
hard_stops.logic: Map sheet size, scale, margins, or labeling does not meet the recorder's minimum standards for recording

soft_flags.label: Easement Dedication on Map
soft_flags.logic: Map includes dedication of new easements — verify that all affected property owners have signed the dedication certificates
